description: Similar-triangles geometric unsharpness, side view: pellet-stack source of width F (left), part block whose source-side top edge is the object plane (center), film plane with a small gap behind it (right); rays from the source's top and bottom extremes graze the same edge and diverge, opening a solid umbra plus hatched penumbra Ug on the film; d and t dimension chain below, Ug = F·t/d chip top-right.
